title: AHBD Industries 11Pcs Mini Screwdriver Sets,Small Screwdriver Set Eyeglass Sunglass Repair Interchangeable Torx Screwdrivers Sets, Watch Repair Kit, Laptop Repair Tool kit, Precision Tools
features: HEAVY DUTY MATERIAL - The mini set screwdriver is made of steel and coated with chrome finish and processed with heat treatment for lasting performance.

ADJUSTABLE & ANTI-SLIP HAND TOOLS - The magnetic precision screwdriver kit is crafted with 5-level adjustable pole and magnetic head for easy operation. The handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to hold due to its ergonomic design. Magnetic tips for easy installation and removal of fasteners with excellent durability, effectively reduces hand fatigue. Each screwdriver bit fits perfectly onto the handle, and can easily be changed from one to the other.

PORTABLE SIZE & CARRYING CASE - A handy storage case is included to keep the screwdrivers organized and well stored. 11 Different Sizes / Styles: Includes 00-Point, 0-Point, 1-Point Phillips and Flat head 1.0mm,1.2mm,1.4mm, 1.8mm, 2.4mm, 3.0mm and 1 Awl,1 Magnetic.

WIDE APPLICATIONS - The 11pc precision small screwdriver set can be used for both individual and professional purposes including repairing phones, watchmakers screwdriver set, TVs, computer kit, laptops, iphone repair kit, eyeglasses repair kit, cameras, pc tool kit set, watch tool kit , miniture screwdriver set ,small glasses screwdriver tool ,optical screwdriver set, household appliances. This precision mini screwdriver set is perfect tool for all fine mechanical repairs.

100% MONEY-BACK - If you, for whatever reasons, do not like our 11 in 1 magnetic screwdriver set within 30 days, please feel free to contact us and we will, within 24 hours, arrange a full refund or a replacement without any questions asked.
description: Product description: This professional Precision Screwdriver Set, is perfect for your needs, as this can be used for many appliances (Like Glass repair kit, Watches, Mobile Phones, Hobby Miniatures) with its 11 different screw bits, to cater to whichever appliance or accessory, you are looking to repair or make, a must for your workman (or woman) needs. Package Contents, a toolkit widely used for Apple iPhone, Macbook, watch kit, Sunglasses, eyeglasses, spectacles, watch and other small screwdriver set for all electronics repair and non-electronics devices. Product Size (11 Pc Kit): 11Pcs Precision Screw Drivers Set Screwdriver - no.00 Screwdriver - no.0 Screwdriver - no.1 Flathead Screwdriver - 1.0mm Flathead Screwdriver - 1.2mm Flathead Screwdriver - 1.4mm Flathead Screwdriver - 1.8mm Flathead Screwdriver – 2.4mm Flathead Screwdriver - 3.0mm Screwdriver Specifications: Item weight: 80g Screws: stainless steel Screwdriver: hard metal with magnetic Note: the magnetic can grip and hold the metal screw but useless for stainless steel screw. Legal Disclaimer: Warning: Using hand tools can be dangerous. Always take care and keep away from children. Wear protection in work area at all times. Select correct type and size tool for the job in hand.
